dashboard.set_location_body: Visit Settings > Your Location to calculate today's prayer schedule.
dashboard.praying_early_body: {{prayer}} has not started yet. Are you completing it early due to a valid reason?

settings.theme_subtitle: Please select from auto, day mode or night mode.
settings.prayer_times_subtitle: How your prayer times should be calculated
settings.auto_method_body: Choose the prayer calculation method from your saved timezone.
settings.auto_location_body: Auto-refresh your saved location when the browser allows it.
settings.method_support: Prayer times are based on your selected method and madhab, with optional per-prayer minute adjustments.
settings.auto_mode_support: Automatic mode is currently using {{method}} for your saved timezone.
settings.your_location_subtitle: Prayer times follow the saved location
settings.timezone_body: Used to calculate your daily prayer schedule.
settings.manual_location_helper: Enter coordinates when location access is unavailable.
settings.device_fallback_support: Using your device timezone as a fallback - coordinate lookup was unavailable.
settings.notifications_subtitle: Please select which types of notifications you would like to receive.
settings.alert_all_prayers: Enable alerts for all prayers at once.
settings.individual_alert_support: Individual prayer alerts are controlled on the Home prayer list using the alert button next to each prayer.
settings.google_account_linked_body: Prayer history syncs automatically to your Drive app-data folder.
settings.google_account_unlinked_body: Sign in to back up and restore your data across devices.

quran.title: Quran
quran.subtitle: Read, search, and save verses.
quran.search_subtitle: Find a surah, verse, or phrase
quran.no_bookmarks: No bookmarks yet. Save verses from the reader to keep them close.

hadith.title: Hadith
hadith.subtitle: Browse books, search narrations, and save bookmarks.
hadith.prayer_study_copy: Review guided narration collections focused on salah and daily practice.
hadith.no_bookmarks: No bookmarked hadith yet. Save items from a chapter to keep them close.

duas.subtitle: Supplication, remembrance, and personal practice.
